provisions.title: Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. Short title and commencement
This Act may be cited as the Civil Aviation Regulation (Reform) Act, and shall come into operation on such date as the Minister may, by Order published in the Gazette , appoint.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: Air Botswana as registered under the Companies Act (Cap. 42:01)

a licence issued by the Regulator, granting an operator the authority to carry passengers, mail or cargo, by air, for hire or reward, on such scheduled air transport services, and subject to such conditions, as may be specified in the licence
the date when all or part of Air Botswana's equity is first owned by a person other than the Government
the period commencing on the closing date and ending on the fifth anniversary of the closing date
the independent body responsible for the economic regulation of civil aviation, that may be established
the holder of an air transport licence
